description_long: This object is a large, freestanding wooden cabinet or shelving unit designed to resemble a rustic house or lodge, featuring two main sections connected by a central passage. The exterior is clad in dark wood planks, and the structure includes multiple rectangular windows with white framing, some of which are transparent, suggesting glass panels. The roof is partially open, exposing the interior compartments and shelves, which are divided into several rooms or sections. The front side features a prominent central doorway and symmetrical window placement, while the rear and side views reveal additional shelving and open compartments. The overall design is robust and architectural, with visible support beams and a layout that mimics a small building or pavilion.
description: A large, house-shaped wooden cabinet or shelving unit with multiple windows, open roof sections, and a central passageway. The structure is detailed with dark wood planks and white-framed glass panels.
description_view_0: The front view shows the symmetrical facade with a central doorway and four white-framed windows, highlighting the main entrance and architectural details.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the structure, with two windows and an open roof section exposing the interior compartments.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a large glass panel on the left section and a solid wooden wall on the right, with the central passageway visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing two windows and open roof framing, with interior shelving visible.
